sources.manufacturerUrl: masterbuiltlenses.com (tier-1; spec sheet requires direct contact; numerical dims not on website)
sources.weightG: cinevisuals.com / fjsinternational.com spec tables: 4.20 lbs = 1,905g → 1,910g. cinevisuals.com / fjsinternational.com spec tables (tier-2) + masterbuiltlenses.com marketing PDF (tier-2)
sources.frontDiameterMm: cinevisuals.com spec table: 114mm front diameter. cinevisuals.com / fjsinternational.com spec tables (tier-2) + masterbuiltlenses.com marketing PDF (tier-2)
sources.closeFocusM: cinevisuals.com / bokehrentals.com: 11 in = 279mm = 0.28m. cinevisuals.com / fjsinternational.com spec tables (tier-2) + masterbuiltlenses.com marketing PDF (tier-2)
sources.introductionYear: Not found in searchable press archives across 6 tiers
sources.imageCircleMm: Described as FF/LF/VV coverage; no exact mm published in any accessible source
sources.opticalElements: Not published in any accessible source
sources.filterType: No filter provision information found in any accessible source
sources.filterThreadMm: filterType null; no filter provision confirmed
sources.isParfocal: Masterbuilt marketing PDF: 'parfocal' explicitly stated. cinevisuals.com / fjsinternational.com spec tables (tier-2) + masterbuiltlenses.com marketing PDF (tier-2)
sources.hasFocusBreathing: Masterbuilt marketing PDF: 'no breathing, no distortion' explicitly stated. cinevisuals.com / fjsinternational.com spec tables (tier-2) + masterbuiltlenses.com marketing PDF (tier-2)
sources.focusRingRotationDeg: Not published in any accessible source
sources.gearPitch: cinevisuals.com / masterbuilt marketing PDF: 0.8 MOD geared rings. cinevisuals.com / fjsinternational.com spec tables (tier-2) + masterbuiltlenses.com marketing PDF (tier-2)
